db_connection: CODE-ONLY — sqlcmd not approved. Command attempted: sqlcmd -S localhost,1433 -U SA -P "***" -Q "SELECT name FROM sys.databases"

data_sources.name: CatalogDB
data_sources.engine: SQL Server (Azure SQL Edge — mcr.microsoft.com/azure-sql-edge in docker-compose.yml)

data_sources.name: IdentityDB
data_sources.engine: SQL Server (same Docker instance as CatalogDB — sqlserver service)

data_sources.name: Browser LocalStorage (BlazorAdmin)
data_sources.engine: Blazored.LocalStorage (browser localStorage API via Blazor WASM)
data_sources.invalidation: CatalogItem writes call RefreshLocalStorageList() — removes and re-fetches. Brand/Type lists cleared on BlazorAdmin startup only (ClearLocalStorageCache in Program.cs). Brand/Type NOT refreshed on CatalogItem write operations.
data_sources.implementation: Decorator pattern: CachedCatalogItemServiceDecorator wraps CatalogItemService; CachedCatalogLookupDataServiceDecorator<T> wraps CatalogLookupDataService<T>

data_sources.name: IMemoryCache — Web MVC Catalog View
data_sources.engine: ASP.NET Core IMemoryCache (in-process per server instance)
data_sources.invalidation: TTL-only. NO explicit invalidation on admin writes. BlazorAdmin/PublicApi catalog edits will not immediately appear in Web MVC storefront — up to 30s stale.
data_sources.scale_risk: In-process — not shared across multiple Web instances. Each instance has its own cache state.

data_sources.name: HTTP Cookie — Anonymous Basket Identity
used_by: Web MVC (src/Web) — GetOrSetBasketCookieAndUserName in basket page code
data_sources.content: GUID string used as anonymous BuyerId in Baskets table
data_sources.security_notes: No Secure or HttpOnly flags confirmed in code review. GUID persists in Baskets table indefinitely — no cleanup mechanism for stale anonymous baskets.
data_sources.on_login: TransferBasketAsync migrates items from anonymous GUID basket to authenticated user basket, then deletes anonymous basket.

data_sources.name: Static File System — Product Images
data_sources.engine: Local filesystem / Docker volume served via ASP.NET Core static files middleware
data_sources.stored_value: PictureUri column in Catalog table stores template 'http://catalogbaseurltobereplaced/images/products/{n}.png'
data_sources.upload_status: DISABLED — security concern noted in CreateCatalogItemEndpoint.cs (ref GitHub issue #537). New items use eCatalog-item-default.png placeholder.
data_sources.production_recommendation: Upload to blob storage and serve via CDN after verification (per code comment in CreateCatalogItemEndpoint.cs)
